subcodes.first_line: O ancient servant of the Ancient Beauty! Blessed art thou that thou art associated with this Threshold and belongest to this Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده دیرین جمال قدم خوشا بحال تو که باین آستان منسوبی و باین درگاه از
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
